violations.text: A rolling gate in the back loading dock area is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) Underside of vents in refrigeration units observed with spilled food residue 2) Fan covers inside of walk-in cooler observed with dust 3) Large accumulation of ice in walk-in freezer near fan areas New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2024

Employees personal belongings were observed stored in food storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2024
